mapper.sql: select id, notice_title, notice_content, notice_type, publish_user_id, publish_user_name, publish_time, status, top_flag, top_end_time, read_count, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time, remark from community_notice
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM community_notice WHERE (#{noticeTitle} IS NULL OR #{noticeTitle} = '' OR notice_title = #{noticeTitle}) AND (#{noticeContent} IS NULL OR #{noticeContent} = '' OR notice_content = #{noticeContent}) AND (#{noticeType} IS NULL OR #{noticeType} = '' OR notice_type = #{noticeType}) AND (#{publishUserId} IS NULL OR publish_user_id = #{publishUserId}) AND (#{publishUserName} IS NULL OR #{publishUserName} = '' OR publish_user_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{publishUserName}, '%')) AND (#{publishTime} IS NULL OR publish_time = #{publishTime}) AND (#{status} IS NULL OR #{status} = '' OR status = #{status}) AND (#{topFlag} IS NULL OR #{topFlag} = '' OR top_flag = #{topFlag}) AND (#{topEndTime} IS NULL OR top_end_time = #{topEndTime}) AND (#{readCount} IS NULL OR read_count = #{readCount})
mapper.insert: insert into community_notice ( notice_title, notice_content, notice_type, publish_user_id, publish_user_name, publish_time, status, top_flag, top_end_time, read_count, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time, remark ) values ( #{noticeTitle}, #{noticeContent}, #{noticeType}, #{publishUserId}, #{publishUserName}, #{publishTime}, #{status}, #{topFlag}, #{topEndTime}, #{readCount}, #{createBy}, #{createTime}, #{updateBy}, #{updateTime}, #{remark} )
mapper.update: UPDATE community_notice SET notice_title = IF(#{noticeTitle} IS NOT NULL AND #{noticeTitle} != '', #{noticeTitle}, notice_title), notice_content = IF(#{noticeContent} IS NOT NULL AND #{noticeContent} != '', #{noticeContent}, notice_content), notice_type = IF(#{noticeType} IS NOT NULL AND #{noticeType} != '', #{noticeType}, notice_type), publish_user_id = IF(#{publishUserId} IS NOT NULL, #{publishUserId}, publish_user_id), publish_user_name = IF(#{publishUserName} IS NOT NULL AND #{publishUserName} != '', #{publishUserName}, publish_user_name), publish_time = IF(#{publishTime} IS NOT NULL, #{publishTime}, publish_time), status = IF(#{status} IS NOT NULL AND #{status} != '', #{status}, status), top_flag = IF(#{topFlag} IS NOT NULL, #{topFlag}, top_flag), top_end_time = IF(#{topEndTime} IS NOT NULL, #{topEndTime}, top_end_time), read_count = IF(#{readCount} IS NOT NULL, #{readCount}, read_count), create_by = IF(#{createBy} IS NOT NULL, #{createBy}, create_by), create_time = IF(#{createTime} IS NOT NULL, #{createTime}, create_time), update_by = IF(#{updateBy} IS NOT NULL, #{updateBy}, update_by), update_time = IF(#{updateTime} IS NOT NULL, #{updateTime}, update_time), remark = IF(#{remark} IS NOT NULL, #{remark}, remark) WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.delete:
delete from community_notice where id in
#{id}
